title: Amnezia
description: Minecraft mod: unlock recipes by finding scrolls. 782 recipes, 6 rarities. Fabric 1.21.1
body:
# Amnezia - Recipe Discovery Mod

Transform Minecraft crafting into a progression system. Players start with only basic recipes and must find scrolls in structure chests to unlock new crafting abilities.

## Features

- 🎲 **6 Rarity Tiers** - Common to Ancient scrolls
- 📦 **782 Recipes** - Fully configurable distribution
- 🏛️ **Hierarchical Groups** - Parent scrolls unlock entire categories
- 🔄 **Recipe Loss on Death** - Optional hardcore mode
- ⚙️ **Highly Configurable** - JSON-based configs
- 🌍 **60+ Structures** - Customizable loot tables

## How It Works

Players begin knowing only planks, sticks, and wooden/stone tools. Every other recipe must be discovered by finding scrolls in chests. Each scroll teaches one recipe or a group of related recipes.

Scrolls stack, glow with enchantment effect, and show different colors based on rarity. Optional death penalty resets all learned recipes.

## Installation

Requires Fabric Loader. Drop the JAR into your `mods/` folder.

## Commands

- `/amnezia give <rarity> random` - Give random scroll
- `/amnezia reset` - Reset player recipes
- `/amnezia reload` - Reload configs

## Disclaimer

Code generated with AI assistance. Created for personal modpack use.
